creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lapo Luchini from comment #2)

Release notes says: "This release marks the switch of the default configuration language for Vector from TOML to YAML. We continue to support both (as well as JSON),..."

https://github.com/vectordotdev/vector/blob/v0.33.0/Cargo.toml

In the next 1-2 days I can take a look
